notes: DEATH visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: The Attending Doctor
visitors.lore_text: You see The Attending Doctor. (DEATH beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense the attending doctor is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with The Attending Doctor. The room registers it.
steps.listen: The Attending Doctor tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give The Attending Doctor what they were after.
steps.sit_with: The Attending Doctor stays for a beat. You stay back.
